# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build
on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      build_status: ${{ toJson('${{ steps.build_command.outputs.status }}') }}

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up custom build command
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: 3.x

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Run custom build command
      id: build_command
      shell: bash
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      run: |
        # Custom build command goes here, replace with your command using $INPUT_BUILD_COMMAND as variable
        $INPUT_BUILD_COMMAND

    - name: Save build status
      if: ${{ steps.build_command.outputs.status == 'success' }}
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: build-artifact
        path: .
